stablecoins.note: Circle native USDC on Base Sepolia

bridge.note: LayerZero V2 endpoint on Base Sepolia

notes.tangle: Set TANGLE env var to the deployed Tangle proxy address
notes.poseidon: Poseidon libraries must be deployed via circomlibjs before running the Forge script. Set POSEIDON_HASHER to the deployed PoseidonHasher address.
notes.verifiers: Verifier contracts must be deployed from circuit artifacts. Set VANCHOR_VERIFIER to the deployed VAnchorVerifier address.
